articles.title: Karnataka 'nataka' not over yet? Siddaramaiah, Shivakumar in Delhi as Congress weighs next moves
articles.description: A day after annoucing that he would step down as chief miniter to pave way for Shivakumar in accordance with the rotational formula agreed upon after the 2023 win, Siddaramaiah expressed his desire to stay in Benglauru than move to Rajya Sabha which was part of an offer pitched by the party high command. Siddaramaiah's move to "partly  agree" with the top brass, while holding his ground on not moving to the Rajdhaani for national politics largely suggest that the deveopment may mutate to become a complex quagmire.

articles.description: In a dramatic turn of events, Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket was engulfed in flames during a launch pad catastrophe at Cape Canaveral. Fortunately, founder Jeff Bezos announced that all team members are safe, with an investigation already underway.

articles.title: Air India plane that stayed airborne for 9hrs was under repair for 6 years
articles.description: An Air India flight to San Francisco returned to Delhi after nine hours due to a malfunctioning Traffic Collision Avoidance System. The Boeing 777, named 'Goa', had been grounded for six years at Nagpur's MRO facility due to a shortage of spare parts. Critical components, including engines and landing gear, were replaced during its extensive overhaul.

articles.title: Back in Tajpur, Sooryavanshi remains the kid who never forgives or forgets
articles.description: While the cricket world marvelled at Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s breathtaking 29-ball 97 in the IPL Eliminator, people in his village of Tajpur watched it like just another day. From smashing bowlers twice his age as a teenager to rapidly making adjustments within weeks, the 15-year-old’s rise has stunned even seasoned cricketers but not the clan that saw him take his early steps in Bihar.
articles.full_text: Sab temperament ka khel hai, aur Vaibhav par Bhole ka haath hai Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. Read More

articles.title: Italy on red alert as France, Portugal beat hottest May day record
articles.description: Italy issued a red alert warning for the capital Rome on Thursday and Portugal and France reported their hottest days in May as Europe struggled with a heatwave that has smashed records across the continent. Britain and France have already reported their hottest-ever May days this week as a "heat dome" brought sweltering temperatures usually unseen until high summer to western Europe.

articles.title: Why ‘Looksmaxxing’ streamer Androgenic got kicked off a Jetstar flight despite claiming medical clearance?
articles.description: Ronan Androgenic, a Brisbane-based “looksmaxxing” streamer, was removed from a Jetstar flight after staff said he appeared too unwell to travel following facial surgery in Thailand. Androgenic argued he was simply tired and had medical clearance. Jetstar later said crew members can refuse boarding if they believe a passenger is not fit to fly safely.

articles.title: "I'm done with the abuse": QTCinderella threatens legal action against “hate farming” clip accounts after emotional return online
articles.description: Popular Twitch streamer QTCinderella has announced plans to take legal action against clip accounts that allegedly use her stream content to spread harassment and misleading narratives. Returning online after grieving the loss of her dog Swift, she said she would issue DMCA takedowns against malicious reposts. The move comes amid growing concerns over “clip farming” on social media, where creators’ content is repackaged with misleading context to generate engagement and fuel online hate campaigns.

articles.description: The Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (JCECEB) has released the B.Ed admit cards for the 2026 examination, scheduled for May 31, 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website by logging in with their credentials. The admit card contains essential candidate details and must be verified for accuracy.

articles.title: COMEDK UGET result 2026 today at 4 PM, Counselling process to begin soon: Check details here
articles.description: The COMEDK UGET 2026 results are scheduled for release today, May 29, at 4 pm on comedk.org. Engineering aspirants can access their scorecards and rank cards, crucial for admission to over 150 private colleges in Karnataka. The counselling process is expected to commence in June following the result announcement.

articles.title: BSNL SET exam date announced, admit cards to be released soon: Check complete details here
articles.description: BSNL has announced the Senior Executive Trainee (SET) exam date for July 5, 2026, for Telecom and Finance streams. A total of 120 vacancies are available. The exam features 200 objective questions with a three-hour duration and negative marking. Admit cards are expected four to five days prior to the exam.

articles.title: Rumer Willis alleges she was emotionally abused by ex
articles.description: Rumer Willis has bravely opened up about her tumultuous relationship with Derek Richard Thomas, alleging a pattern of emotional abuse that she claims has severely impacted her life. According to fresh court filings regarding their ongoing custody dispute over their toddler, Willis accuses Thomas of engaging in 'insane emotional abuse' that became increasingly severe following their child's arrival.

articles.title: Vijay’s flight photo with an air hostess goes viral
articles.description: A candid photograph of actor-politician Vijay with an air hostess during a recent flight has gone viral, captivating fans. The image, shared by cabin crew member Uma Meenakshi, highlights Vijay's humble and approachable demeanor, earning widespread praise for his down-to-earth nature. This simple interaction underscores his enduring connection with audiences.

articles.title: Ram Charan recalls PM Narendra Modi meeting
articles.description: Ram Charan shared his conversation with PM Modi about his film 'Peddi,' highlighting its focus on rural empowerment and India's evolving identity. He noted the growing trend of South Indian cinema exploring village-centric narratives. Meanwhile, 'Peddi' is generating significant buzz, with impressive advance bookings in North America, signaling strong overseas demand for the sports action entertainer.

articles.title: Salman acts as PEACEMAKER in Ranveer-Farhan's 'Don 3' dispute
articles.description: Salman Khan is reportedly stepping in to mediate a brewing 'Don 3' dispute between Ranveer Singh and Farhan Akhtar, stemming from creative differences. The superstar has personally contacted both to foster an amicable resolution, urging them to prioritize future projects and industry unity. Both actors are said to be taking his advice seriously, aiming for a private settlement. Read on to know more in detail.
